title: constant functions with multi-dimensional regs and for-loops

features.name: unpacked_reg_array_with_for_loop_in_constant_function
features.description: Code should include a constant function that declares a local unpacked reg array (one-dimensional memory) and uses a for-loop to write to it before returning a value from the array

features.name: dual_unpacked_reg_arrays_with_ternary_selection_in_constant_function
features.description: Code should include a constant function that declares two local unpacked reg arrays and uses a for-loop to write to both arrays, then selects between them using a ternary operator based on a function input
